title: Restaurant Ordering
context: You are meeting a friend for dinner at a busy restaurant. Talk to the server, ask about the menu, place your order, and make one special request politely.
user_role: A customer ordering dinner and asking about suitable menu options
agent_role: A restaurant server recommending dishes and taking an order
opening_prompt: Hi there, welcome in. Are you ready to order, or would you like me to recommend a few popular dishes first?
